data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for usage limits.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding usage limits (total redemptions, per customer). However, the provided evidence does not include any specific details or examples that demonstrate how these usage limits are implemented or enforced within the system. As a result, it is not possible to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or identify any gaps.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or enforcement of usage limits (total redemptions, per customer).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement for usage limits.
